# FutureSafe Insurance Services

> Independent insurance advisors comparing health, life, and motor insurance from 30+ insurers, with free quotes, premium calculators, and claims support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, services, premium calculator, and quote request.
- [About](/about): Who we are and how we work.
- [Services](/services): Full list of insurance lines we advise on.
- [Health Insurance](/health-insurance): Individual, family, and group health plans.
- [Life Insurance](/life-insurance): Term, whole, and savings-linked life cover.
- [Motor Insurance](/motor-insurance): Car and two-wheeler cover with roadside assistance.
- [Blog](/blog): Plain-English guides on insurance topics.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about cover, claims, and pricing.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch or request a free quote.
